description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Involves a settlement related to an inheritance divided into three shares; one of the parties is a woman named Nāshiya. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
